title: Emberlight Survival
description: A fabric based vanilla+ mod pack I made to play with friends, and though I would share it.
body:
This modpack is loosely based off of Better Adventures+ (By flowstatevideo) and was the original inspiration for it. It's an amazing modpack but I wanted to make something that's similar with some of my own personal touches.



I've been playing minecraft a long time and it's probably one of my favorite games, but after a while it get's kinda boring because it's usually the same rinse and repeat process. But with this modpack, I've been feeling more inspired to play the game. This pack contains ~150 mods that still has a vanilla feel to the game. 



I'd like to point out that I didn't personally make any of these mods, so please go and support the creators of these mods as well. This modpack LITERALLY wouldn't be possible without them! 🙂

Feel free to join our discord server for community updates and support!: [Emberlight HQ Discord](https://discord.gg/hbADMYHMSU)
